message.content:
# PreOne – Database, API & Cloud Architecture  
*Scalable • Secure • Reliable • Future Ready*  

---  

## CLIENT LAYER  
- **Parent App** (iOS / Android)  
- **Teacher App** (iOS / Android)  
- **Admin Panel** (Web)  
- **Owner Dashboard** (Web)  
- **Third Party Integrations**  

*HTTPS / SSL*  
*JSON Requests*  

---  

## API GATEWAY  
- Authentication (JWT / OAuth 2.0)  
- Authorization (RBAC)  
- Rate Limiting & Throttling  
- Request Routing  
- Logging & Monitoring  

---  

## BACKEND MICRO-SERVICES  
- **User Service**  
  - Parents  
  - Teachers  
  - Students  
  - Admins  
  - Roles & Permissions  
- **Student Service**  
  - Student Profile  
  - Enrollment  
  - Documents  
  - Medical Records  
  - Sibling Management  
- **Attendance Service**  
  - Daily Attendance  
  - QR / Face Recognition  
  - Late / Early Checkout  
  - Attendance Reports  
  - Analytics  
- **Academic Service**  
  - Curriculum  
  - Lesson Plans  
  - Activities  
  - Assessments  
  - Learning Goals  
- **Growth & AI Service**  
  - Observation Analysis  
  - AI Growth Score  
  - AI Reports  
  - Recommendations  
  - AI Parent Coach  
  - AI Teacher Assistant  
- **Fee & Billing Service**  
  - Fee Structure  
  - Invoices  
  - Payments  
  - Receipts  
  - Refunds  
  - Financial Reports  
- **Communication Service**  
  - SMS / WhatsApp  
  - Push Notifications  
  - Email  
  - In-App Chat  
  - Announcements  
- **Activity Service**  
  - Activity Planning  
  - Photo / Video Upload  
  - Observations  
  - Classroom Moments  
  - Daily Reports  
- **Transport Service**  
  - Route Management  
  - Vehicle Tracking  
  - Driver Management  
  - Pickup / Drop  
  - Transport Attendance  
- **Document Service**  
  - File Upload  
  - Document Storage  
  - Certificates  
  - ID Cards  
  - Backups  
- **Report & Analytics Service**  
  - Custom Reports  
  - Dashboards  
  - Data Analytics  
  - Export (Excel / PDF)  
  - Insights  

*All services communicate via secure APIs (REST / gRPC)*  

---  

## DATA & STORAGE LAYER  
### PRIMARY DATABASE  
- PostgreSQL (Primary)  
  - Users  
  - Parents  
  - Students  
  - Teachers  
  - Classes  
  - Enrollments  
  - Attendance  
  - Activities  
  - Photos  
  - Videos  
  - Fees  
  - Invoices  
  - Payments  
  - Receipts  
  - Refunds  
  - Reports  
  - Observations  
  - Growth Records  
  - Milestones  
  - Goals  
  - Notifications  
  - Announcements  
  - Documents  
  - Transport  
  - Audit Logs  

### CACHE  
- Redis  
  - Sessions  
  - Cache Data  
  - Real-time Data  
  - Leaderboards  

### FILE STORAGE  
- AWS S3  
  - Photos  
  - Videos  
  - Documents  
  - Certificates  
  - Backups  

### CDN  
- AWS CloudFront  
  - Fast content delivery for images, videos, documents  

---  

## EXTERNAL INTEGRATIONS  
- Payment Gateway: Razorpay / Stripe  
- SMS Gateway: Twilio / MSG91  
- WhatsApp Business API: Meta  
- Email Service: AWS SES / SendGrid  
- Video Streaming: AWS CloudFront  
- Maps & Location: Google Maps API  
- AI / ML Services: OpenAI / Custom Models  
- Calendar Integration: Google Calendar  
- Cloud Storage: AWS S3  

---  

## NOTIFICATION LAYER  
- Firebase Cloud Messaging  
  - Push Notifications  
  - In-App Notifications  
  - Topic Management  
  - Real-time Updates  

---  

## SECURITY LAYER  
- JWT Authentication  
- OTP Verification  
- 2FA Support  
- Data Encryption (At Rest & In Transit)  
- Role Based Access Control (RBAC)  
- Audit Logs & Monitoring  
- Regular Backups  
- Compliance Ready (GDPR, DPD)  

---  

## INFRASTRUCTURE LAYER (CLOUD - AWS)  
- EC2 (Compute)  
- ECS / Docker (Containers)  
- RDS (PostgreSQL)  
- ElastiCache (Redis)  
- S3 (Storage)  
- CloudFront (CDN)  
- Route 53 (DNS)  
- CloudWatch (Monitoring)  
- AWS Backup (Backup)  

---  

## DEVOPS & OPERATIONS  
- GitHub (Code Repository)  
- CI / CD Pipeline (GitHub Actions)  
- Docker (Containerization)  
- Nginx (Load Balancer)  
- Monitoring (CloudWatch)  
- Logging (CloudWatch Logs)  
- Alerts (SNS / Email)  

---  

## DATA FLOW  
1. Client sends request to API Gateway  
2. Gateway validates & routes to appropriate microservice  
3. Service processes request & interacts with database / cache / storage  
4. Response returned to client in JSON format  
5. Real-time updates via WebSocket / FCM Notifications  

---  

## KEY HIGHLIGHTS  
- Microservices Architecture  
- Scalable & Modular  
- Secure by Design  
- High Availability (99.9%)  
- Real-time Communication  
- AI-Powered Insights  
- Cloud Native (AWS)  
- Future Ready
